title: CaratLane Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: CaratLane Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with CaratLane Advisory Limited! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About CaratLane Advisory Limited:
CaratLane Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane Advisory Limited!
